title: selaginella phillipsiana
intro: Selaginella phillipsiana, also known as Spiny Club Fern, is a type of spore-producing plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in various compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Selaginella phillipsiana is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts can also be used in herbal remedies, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine.
